hardware.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 Ti Laptop GPU

notes: Reuses the proven RTX 5070 compute profile from char-v2-big.
Dataset/tokenizer switched to BPE shards for improved sample efficiency and quality.
command: PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -m llm.cli train --shards-path data/shards_global/fineweb-global-bpe-v1 --output-dir artifacts/checkpoints/fineweb-global-bpe-v1-big-run1 --device cuda --max-steps 50000 --batch-size 34 --context-length 512 --n-layers 12 --n-heads 12 --d-model 768 --learning-rate 1.5e-4 --eval-interval 2000 --eval-steps 5 --log-interval 100 --precision auto
